codeReview.summary: Implementation correctly extends KgNodeType and KgRelation with new variants, creates comprehensive DependencyGraph with 22 passing tests, and provides full graph query API including traversal and impact analysis. The implementation is functionally complete and passes all verification steps.

issues.description: KgNodeType::Test cannot be created from AST parsing - ChunkType enum in treesitter.rs has no Test variant. KgNodeType::Test can only be added programmatically via add_node(), not via from_parse_result(). This is acceptable if Test nodes are expected to be added manually, but the feature description suggests AST-based construction should support all node types.

KgEdge derives PartialEq and Eq but not Hash. This is a minor limitation - edges cannot be put in a HashSet, only compared for equality. The merge() function works around this by checking edge.id. Consider adding Hash derive if edge deduplication by content is ever needed.
KgTraversal uses full path serde::Serialize/Deserialize while other types in the same file use imported Serialize/Deserialize. Minor inconsistency in code style.

KgNodeType::Variable cannot be created from AST parsing - ChunkType enum in treesitter.rs has no Variable variant. Only Function, Method, Class, Struct, Enum, Module, Interface, and Trait chunks are extracted from AST. Variables within functions are not tracked as separate nodes.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The Rust skill SKILL.md recommends using thiserror::Error for errors, but this implementation uses String for error returns (from_source returns Result<Self, String>). AGENTS.md doesn't specify error handling conventions for this crate.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: dependency_graph.rs:223 - pub fn from_source(source: &[u8], language: SourceLanguage) -> Result<Self, String>

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker followed the Rust skill correctly for ownership patterns and async/await. No procedure deviations noted. However, the skill doesn't cover tree-sitter integration patterns which were needed for this feature.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript shows proper use of owned types, borrowed references, and Result handling. No ownership errors in implementation.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker discovered that tree-sitter grammars are not available for all languages - TypeScript, JavaScript, Go, etc. return None from to_language(). This knowledge about language support limitations is not documented anywhere in the library.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: treesitter.rs:70-73 shows many languages return None from to_language(). Worker correctly worked around this by testing with Rust and Python which have grammar support.

summary: Feature ast-dependency-graph successfully implemented with typed nodes (File, Module, Class, Function, Variable, Test) and typed edges (CALLS, INHERITS_FROM, IMPORTS, DEPENDS_ON, TESTS, Contains, HasType). The DependencyGraph provides complete graph query API (query_by_name, query_by_type, traverse) and impact analysis. 22 unit tests pass covering graph operations, AST parsing, and dependency queries. Non-blocking issues noted: Variable and Test node types cannot be created from AST parsing (ChunkType limitation), KgEdge lacks Hash derive, and minor serialization style inconsistency.
